description: Streak is a CRM built inside Gmail, with customizable pipelines, automatic email capture, tracking, and mail merge to manage deals without leaving the inbox.
overview: Streak runs pipelines for sales and other processes directly in Gmail, capturing email data automatically and adding tracking, mail merge, and collaboration to the inbox.
what_is: Streak is a CRM that works inside Gmail. It lets teams manage deals and contacts without leaving their inbox, capturing email activity automatically and organizing it into customizable pipelines as messages arrive.

It suits teams that run on email and want a CRM that fits their daily workflow. Logging, pipeline tracking, and task prioritization happen in place, so there is little extra data entry and value shows up quickly.

Streak doubles as a CRM and an email tool, integrating deeply with Gmail. It is less suited to large enterprises that need a complex standalone CRM or to teams that do not use Gmail; its strength is simple, inbox-native pipeline management.
